content: claude -p (--print) flags for non-interactive MCP invocation: -p runs headless and exits. --mcp-config <json-file> loads MCP servers. --strict-mcp-config uses ONLY --mcp-config servers, ignoring global MCP config (makes invocation hermetic). --allowedTools 'mcp__server__tool' 'Read' 'Grep' 'Glob' pre-grants named tools without prompting. --output-format stream-json for JSONL events. --verbose for full turn-by-turn output including tool events. --bare skips auto-discovery of hooks/skills/plugins/MCP/CLAUDE.md for faster startup (recommended for scripted calls). Process cwd set via Process.currentDirectoryURL. Prompt passed as -p argument or piped via stdin. Environment variables (including GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN) are inherited from the parent process environment if set on Process.environment. Current claude version: 2.1.191.
